description: Start a file receiver server in the background. The server listens for incoming files and saves them to the specified directory. Use stop_receiver to shut it down.

auth_token.description: Require senders to present this token (HMAC bearer). Leave empty to disable auth. Distinct from `mcp_auth_token`.

https.description: Enable HTTPS with an auto-generated self-signed certificate (default: false).

mcp_auth_token.description: Local MCP auth token. Required only when the server has `AEROSYNC_MCP_SECRET` set.

overwrite.description: Allow overwriting existing files with the same name (default: false).

save_to.description: Directory where received files are saved (default: "./received").
